zh.lifeSummary: 當Thurston de Banastre於1192年出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，他的父親Robert de Banastre III20歲，母親Mrs. Robert BANASTRE21歲。他於1217年與Cecelia de Mohaut在英國藍卡爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1219年在他的家鄉享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thurston de Banastre于1192年出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，他的父亲Robert de Banastre III20岁，母亲Mrs. Robert BANASTRE21岁。他于1217年与Cecelia de Mohaut在英国藍卡爾牛頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1219年在他的家乡享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of the Latin name Augustinus ( see Augustine ). Both forms were used selectively in various regions of England as late as the 17th century and they are found occasionally much later, but the present-day use of this form as a given name is normally a reintroduction from its survival as a surname. It is particularly popular in the United States.

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Thurston de Banastre was born in 1192, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Banastre III, was 20 and his mother, Mrs. Robert BANASTRE, was 21. He married Cecelia de Mohaut in 1217, in Newton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1219, in his hometown, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thurston de Banastre est né en 1192, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Banastre III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert BANASTRE, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Cecelia de Mohaut en 1217, à Newton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1219, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thurston de Banastre 1192 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Banastre III 20 und seine Mutter Mrs. Robert BANASTRE 21. Er hat 1217 in Newton, Lancashire, England Cecelia de Mohaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1219 im Alter von 28 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Banastre è nato il nel 1192 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Banastre III, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Robert BANASTRE, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Cecelia de Mohaut nel 1217, nel Newton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1219, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thurston de Banastreが1192年にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Robert de Banastre IIIは20歳，母Mrs. Robert BANASTREは21歳であった。1217年にイギリスランカシュアイアニュートンでCecelia de Mohautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1219年に故郷で28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thurston de Banastre(이)가 1192년 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Banastre III(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert BANASTRE(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1217년 영국 랭카실르 뉴턴에서 Cecelia de Mohaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1219년 그의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Banastre nasceu em 1192, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Banastre III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert BANASTRE, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecelia de Mohaut em 1217, em Newton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1219, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thurston de Banastre родился в 1192 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Banastre III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert BANASTRE, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecelia de Mohaut в 1217 г. в местности нютон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1219 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 28 лет.
